message:
style: rustfmt formatting in H2 connection and perf invariant tests

- Reformat SettingsFrame::new() call to standard multi-line style
- Break long assert! message onto separate line in settings ACK test
- Reformat unwrap_or_else closures in baseline/unit-matrix markdown
  status snapshot assertions for line length compliance
